General.Name: Cann Group Ltd
General.Description: Cann Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the breeding, cultivation, manufacture, and sale of medicinal cannabis in Australia and Europe. Its product portfolio includes the Satipharm delivery system for cannabinoids. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Mildura, Australia.
